leadText: Spin Out (Japanese: ホイールスピン Wheel Spin) is a damage-dealing Steel-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Varoom and Revavroom.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Spin Out inflicts damage and lowers the user's Speed by two stages.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Spin Out has a unique animation if it is used by a Starmobile . It shares this trait with Steel Roller .
